title: Trumps Full Metal Jacket
summary:
Main
The early days of Donald Trump's Presidency has been characterised by tariffs, taxes, and more restrictions, in essence; The United States against the world. On 12 February, the US released an executive order mandating a 25% tariff on allsteel and aluminium imports starting from 12 March, despite warnings from Europe and China. The European bloc stands together in its response with the EU President Ursula von der Leyen stating, "Unjustified tariffs on the EU will not go unanswered".
